name: you're the last human left
description:
After nuclear war destroys all life on Earth, you are the last human left, living alone on a space station until the oxygen runs out

-

> 𝐅𝐔𝐋𝐋 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 <

In the year 2097, a nuclear war annihilated Earth, reducing the planet to a lifeless, irradiated husk. You were one of three astronauts on a routine mission aboard ORION-7, a deep-space research station orbiting the Moon.


You are now the last known human alive.

Your supplies are running low.

The station’s oxygen supply is depleting.
